arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola tells Arsenal to prepare for ‘a war’ with Manchester City
arts.sum: Guardiola has also called on opposite number Mikel Arteta to explain himself after claiming he had “all the information” about City.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola demands answers from Mikel Arteta after Arsenal chief's cryptic message
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola has thrown down the gauntlet to Mikel Arteta after the Arsenal chief claimed to know all of his former club's secrets this week

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes honest admission over "war Arsenal cannot win" amid Man City criticism
arts.sum: Arsenal host Leicester on Saturday afternoon with fall out from last weekend's draw away to Manchester City still rumbling on - yet for Mikel Arteta the debate around streetwise approach is one that he cannot win

arts.ttl: Pep asks for clarity over Arteta's Man City 'dark arts' comments
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola has demanded clarity from Arsenal counterpart Mikel Arteta over his comments about the Premier League champions' "dark arts".

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta defends his low-block tactics against Man City - and insists trying to attack the champions with 10 men is like 'wearing flip flops and shorts' in winter
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN: Mikel Arteta has mocked critics of Arsenal's recent playing style as he compared calls to attack Manchester City with 10 men to wearing 'flip flops and shorts' in the rain.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola hits back at Mikel Arteta after his barbed comments towards Man City and declares 'WAR' on Arsenal following their ill-tempered 2-2 draw as the Etihad fallout grows heated
arts.sum: JACK GAUGHAN: Pep Guardiola has called on Arsenal's Mikel Arteta to clarify barbed comments he made towards Manchester City in the wake of last weekend's ill-tempered draw.

arts.ttl: 'Now we war' - Angry Pep Guardiola fires back at Mikel Arteta as Man City and Arsenal feud rages
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola was unimpressed with ambiguous comments from Mikel Arteta as he continued the feud with Arsenal

arts.ttl: FIFA set to reveal host venues for next summer's Club World Cup with Chelsea and Man City among the teams set to take in the expanded tournament
arts.sum: Gianni Infantino will appear at the Global Citizen Festival in New York on Saturday to confirm the stadiums that will be used between June 15 to July 13 for the 32-team tournament.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot tells Liverpool to be wary of 'unlucky' Wolves despite the Reds' absurd record against bottom-half teams... and is happy to go under the radar in title race with Man City and Arsenal
arts.sum: JOE BERNSTEIN: Arne Slot urged Liverpool fans not to take three points for granted at bottom club Wolves Saturday as the Premier League's financial dominance means every opponent is a threat.

arts.ttl: Chelsea waiting for green light from Man City amid talks over £50m-a-year deal
arts.sum: Chelsea are watching with interest as a high-profile case involving Man City could be set to give them a huge financial boost. Under Todd Boehly...
